title: 启用 web search 让 Claude 实时搜索网页

body.goal: 在 API 请求中启用 web search server tool，让 Claude 能搜索实时网页内容并附带引用来源
steps: 在 tools 数组中添加 { "type": "web_search_20260209", "name": "web_search" }。这是最新版本，支持 dynamic filtering
发送你的 messages 请求。Claude 会根据 prompt 内容自动判断是否需要搜索——你不需要显式触发
API 在 Anthropic 服务器端执行搜索，一次请求中可能多次搜索。你不需要处理 tool_result
Claude 的最终回复会引用搜索来源。如需 dynamic filtering，确保同时启用 code_execution tool

body_en.goal: Enable the web search server tool in your API request so Claude can search for real-time web content and cite sources
steps: Add { "type": "web_search_20260209", "name": "web_search" } to your tools array. This is the latest version with dynamic filtering support
Send your messages request. Claude automatically decides when to search based on the prompt — no explicit trigger needed
The API executes searches on Anthropic's servers, possibly multiple times per request. You don't handle tool_result
Claude's final response includes cited sources. For dynamic filtering, also enable the code_execution tool
